CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/story/"+ Id , IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), IMAGE( Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c) - 1))*1.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c)))*1.5) ) ,IMAGE("https://fimby.file.force.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_PNG&versionId=068OL00000AFUMc&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOL00000D3OqH&page=0&d=/a/OL000005wbfR/ICJ5TFLRKmvjpeoTjeiu_JeHfsMTXIdzVRWhn5yEGvQ&oid=00D5f000006NDkr","")),"_self" )
CustomField.label: Email Image
